recommendations.title: After.Life
recommendations.overview: Following a terrible car crash, a woman awakes to find an enigmatic mortician preparing her for burial.

recommendations.title: Disquiet
recommendations.overview: After a near-fatal car accident, Sam wakes to discover he is trapped in an abandoned hospital by mysterious and sinister forces that have no intention of letting him leave…

recommendations.title: KM 31: Kilometer 31
recommendations.overview: While driving through the kilometer 31 of a lonely road, Agata Hameran hits a boy. She leaves her car to help the victim and another car runs over her and she falls in a deep coma. Her twin sister Catalina telepathically feels the pain of Agata and h

recommendations.title: Visiting Hours
recommendations.overview: A deranged, misogynistic killer assaults a journalist. When he discovers that she survived the attack, he follows her to the hospital to finish her off.

recommendations.title: The Hunters
recommendations.overview: A policeman from Stockholm come to Norrbotten in Sweden, to join his brother, now when their father is dead. While there he starts to work on a long-running case where reindeers have been poached and soon discovers that his brother is involved...

recommendations.title: Daniel Isn't Real
recommendations.overview: A troubled college freshman resurrects his imaginary friend to help him cope with a violent trauma.

recommendations.title: Fermat's Room
recommendations.overview: Four mathematicians are imprisoned in a shrinking room; with the walls closing in, they must try anything to escape this fatal puzzle.

recommendations.title: Bleed for This
recommendations.overview: The inspirational story of World Champion Boxer Vinny Pazienza, who after a near fatal car crash, which left him not knowing if he'd ever walk again, made one of sports most incredible comebacks.

recommendations.title: The Dead Zone
recommendations.overview: Johnny Smith is a schoolteacher with his whole life ahead of him but, after leaving his fiancee's home one night, is involved in a car crash which leaves him in a coma for 5 years. When he wakes, he discovers he has an ability to see into the past, p

recommendations.title: So Young
recommendations.overview: Although new friendships and new love await her, a college freshman discovers that university life is not as simple as she had hoped.
